additionalFields.description:
=={{ "Workstream: " + $('Loop Over Items').first().json.workstream + "
Cascades to: " + ($('Loop Over Items').first().json.cascade_targets ?? []).join(', ') + "
Days until impact: " + $('Loop Over Items').first().json.days_until_impact + "
Owner: " + $('Loop Over Items').first().json.owner + "
Blocker age: " + $('Loop Over Items').first().json.blocker_age_days + " days
Recommended action: " + $('Loop Over Items').first().json.recommended_action }}

nodes.name: Splits Critical Risks into Separate Items
Pass Risk Summary to Main Workflow

options.jql: ={{ "project = \"" + $json.workstream +"\" AND issueType=\"Risk\" AND summary ~ \"" + $json.description.substring(0, $json.description.lastIndexOf(' ', 50)) + "\" AND created >= -7d ORDER BY created DESC" }}

main.node: Splits Critical Risks into Separate Items
Pass Risk Summary to Main Workflow
